title: Kamish Dagger
description: Make your Sword/Weapon become Kamish Dagger
body:
The resourcepack I made is **Kamish Dagger** from weapon character **Sung Jinwoo**, **Solo Leveling** made by **Chu-Gong**. Feel free to check it out ^^

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fQXxxfY5Jac" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The Resourcepack is fully **Vanilla Custom Model Data** and **CIT Optifine** For the command vanilla one you can check it bottom here :


<details>
<summary>Command - Custom Model Data</summary>
For singleplayer I use this command :
  
```
/give @p minecraft:diamond_sword{CustomModelData:1}
```

</details>

If you guys wanna use the animation-style weapon like me I suggest use the [Better Combat by ZsoltMolnarrr](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat), Here is the command to get the animation-style you want :


<details>
<summary>Command - Custom Model Data Better Combat</summary>

For Style I use is Dagger :

```
/give @p minecraft:diamond_sword{CustomModelData:1,weapon_attributes:'{"parent":"bettercombat:dagger"}'} 1
```


But you can combine this style by using Dagger version and Sword version to make it more visual appealing, but it's up to you ^^

If you guys wanna use different style weapon I suggest to check the GitHub by ZsoltMolnarrr
The link [GitHub](https://github.com/ZsoltMolnarrr/BetterCombat/tree/1.21.1/common/src/main/resources/data/bettercombat/weapon_attributes) is here, you can click it ^^

</details>

If you guys just prefer rename you can use CIT by shsupercm or Optifine

Link CIT Resewn : [https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

Link Optifine : [https://optifine.net/home](https://optifine.net/home)

![Recipe for changing name Sword to Kamish Dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/399c425e43493d1b73813681786657267d08d8c4.png)

You can change it by using all variant Swords, but if you guys wanna use it for different tools then feel free to change it :D but please don't claim it as your own made model, If you guys wanna move it to different version feel free to change it again.

Credit me if you guys wanna use it for Content or for Mod/Modpack, Really appreciate it if you guys did it ^^
